calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Confirm Assets To Trust
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karolyn Poppin for Ann O'Regan and Michael Lieberman (Co-Trustees/Petitioners).

The Court stated that it has no problem with the 850 Petition, except with the 401(k) account. Ms. Poppin asked the Court to issue a bifurcated order. Ms. Poppin is to provide a proposed order that specifically lists the properties that are going to be Trust assets and denies the 401(k) account. The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Assets to Trust (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Rosada. Not reported.
